responsive_constraints: Admin workflow lanes collapse without hiding runtime boundaries.
Source surface tables preserve labels and upstream paths.
Navigation remains reachable before the long database detail sections.
accessibility_notes: Supabase logo uses descriptive alt text.
Runtime blockers are rendered as visible list items.
Route navigation has an active page state.

real: Database editor, auth, storage, and query module source paths are recorded.
Copied logo and Apache-2.0 notice are preserved.
partial: Hosted project state is represented as route structure until credentials are supplied.
blocked: No Supabase mutations, auth writes, or storage calls were executed.
